extension.news:
v1.0.0~beta16 (2026-07-19) - Per-frame-rate offsets now apply only to the frame rate they were saved with. Offsets saved while the mode was off cover all frame rates and are not applied while it is on, instead of acting as a hidden fallback - Turning per-frame-rate offsets on or off shows a dialog explaining which stored offsets are in effect - The stored offsets view now marks inactive entries in both modes, and labels all-rates entries as All FPS
v1.0.0~beta15 (2026-07-19) - Seek back on unpause waits half a second and stands down if another addon or a manual seek moves playback first, so the video never jumps back twice after unpausing
extension.description: Adjust Kodi's audio offset during playback the way you always have. Audio Offset Manager: Evolved remembers the value for that stream's HDR type, audio format, and frame rate, then re-applies it automatically on every matching playback. Includes seek-back after adjustments, playback notifications, and a management view of everything it has learned.
